pi_items.metadata_value: Nx Witness VMS (Network Optix video management system)
pi_items.verified_value: Nx Witness is a real, commercial IP Video Management System (VMS) by Network Optix
pi_items.source: Official Network Optix website (https://www.networkoptix.com/nx-witness) and documentation

pi_items.verified_value: https://localhost:7001/static/index.html (port 7001 is the default Nx Witness web admin port with /static/index.html path for the web interface)
pi_items.source: Nx Witness official documentation (https://support.networkoptix.com/hc/en-us/articles) confirming port 7001 as default

pi_items.verified_value: admin username with password 'Admin1234!' (set during initialization in this synthetic environment, not a default Nx Witness password)
pi_items.source: setup_nx_witness.sh script sets NX_ADMIN_PASS='Admin1234!'; Nx Witness does not have a hardcoded default admin password

pi_items.metadata_value: 6 existing users shown in Users section
pi_items.verified_value: 6 users (1 admin + 5 created during setup: security.operator, camera.admin, site.manager, john.smith, sarah.jones)
pi_items.source: api_log.txt evidence file confirms '6 users' and setup_nx_witness.sh creates these users via REST API

pi_items.verified_value: Both version 5.1.5.39242 and 6.0.1.39873 are real, downloadable Nx Witness versions from https://updates.networkoptix.com/default/
pi_items.source: Verified via HTTP HEAD requests: both URLs return HTTP/2 200 with valid .deb packages; api_log.txt shows 5.1.5.39242 was used

pi_items.metadata_value: Role 'Viewer' is a valid user role in Nx Witness
pi_items.verified_value: 'Viewer' is a predefined user role in Nx Witness (other roles include Owner, Administrator, Advanced Viewer, Live Viewer, and custom roles)
pi_items.source: Nx Witness documentation (https://support.networkoptix.com/hc/en-us/articles) lists Viewer as a standard role

pi_items.metadata_value: New user password 'SecureVMS2024!' for user mike.chen
pi_items.verified_value: Password 'SecureVMS2024!' follows standard format and is accepted by Nx Witness REST API (contains uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters)
pi_items.source: setup_nx_witness.sh creates users with similar password format; Nx Witness accepts arbitrary password strings

pi_items.metadata_value: Email domain for new user: mike.chen@security.local
pi_items.verified_value: Email format is valid; 'security.local' is a plausible internal domain name (not verified as real domain)
pi_items.source: Email format validation; setup_nx_witness.sh creates users with similar email patterns (e.g., @gymvms.local)

pi_items.metadata_value: Task operates within an environment with Nx Witness VMS pre-configured with users and cameras
pi_items.verified_value: This is a SYNTHETIC test environment created from scratch by installation and setup scripts; all data (users, cameras, system config) is generated programmatically
pi_items.source: Entire setup is automated via scripts (install_nx_witness.sh, setup_nx_witness.sh); no real production data; api_log.txt shows initialization date 2026-02-18

privileged_info_summary: This task operates in a synthetic Nx Witness VMS environment (real software product by Network Optix, version 5.1.5.39242). The environment is pre-configured with 6 users (admin + 5 created during setup) and runs on localhost:7001 with admin credentials admin/Admin1234!. The web admin interface is at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html. All system data (users, cameras, configuration) is generated programmatically during environment initialization, not from real production sources. The task requires creating a new user 'mike.chen' with role 'Viewer', which is a valid Nx Witness user role.
